# Python Linting CLI Utility

A command-line interface tool designed to analyze Python source code for errors, stylistic issues, or security flaws. The goal is to provide developers with actionable feedback to improve code quality.

## Guidance

Needs to be fast and potentially compatible with existing Python ecosystems.

## Tech Stack

Python
